query:
SELECT id, name, label FROM custom_fields 
WHERE name LIKE 'test_%' 
   OR name LIKE 'reorder_%'
   OR label LIKE 'Test %'
   OR label LIKE 'Visibility %';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Nn3NsgWfgWMEmv.e05a65be2af1 --database EKvcVicuVoUxTnzjSKzgdk --execute SELECT id, name, label FROM custom_fields 
WHERE name LIKE 'test_%' 
   OR name LIKE 'reorder_%'
   OR label LIKE 'Test %'
   OR label LIKE 'Visibility %';
